'''Fask Eelak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] member of the [[An'yettu clan]]. Eelak also managed to become a member in the prestigious [[Goa-Ato/Legends|Goa-Ato]] and one of the few [[bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] allowed to leave the [[planet/Legends|planet]], sometime after the [[Battle over Coruscant]].<ref name="Assignments" />

==Biography==
Goa-Ato official [[Nilesk]] and her assistant [[Opdoa]] were surprised to see an An'yettu making it into the Guild; considering the clan's unpopularity with the [[Grand Protector/Legends|Grand Protector]] [[Navik/Legends|Navik the Red]], who pushed them in isolation, they considered to assign one of the Most Dangerous (and low-paying) [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]].<ref name="Assignments" /><ref>''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref>

Eelak was given the task of hunting down the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Gerraba]] for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]; Nilesk didn't considered worthy to notify Jabba about the assignment as she doubted that Fask would survive it. Opdoa (who mistaked Eelak for a male) pointed out that in case she could bring the bounty in would result in Eelak earning an [[Atiang/Legends|Atiang]] award; however the nefarious duo knew that "sometimes" the verification process could be stuck indeterminately.<ref name="Assignments" />

==Appearances==
